hmong.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Cov passage sets sau tes uas ua haujlwm tsis tas siv AI. Cov passage import los koom nrog koj lub library; tib lub passage lim tiam dhau lim tiam yog ib qho baseline ncaj ncees dua rau IEP trend piv rau cov ntawv rov tsim tshiab.

hmong.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Qhia tag nrho lub passage li ntawd vib nas this ua ntej pib ntaus. Pab cov tub ntxhais kawm uas nyeem ua ntej ces mam li ntaus. Tus tub kawm hla tau qhov countdown thaum twg los tau.
hmong.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Tom qab li ntawd feeb ntawm kev ntaus (tsis suav lub sijhawm nres), qhia ib qho ceeb toom maj mam kom so. Tshwm ib zaug rau ib qho drill. Kaw ua ntej.

hmong.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Hloov cov xim highlight rau tus cim tam sim no, cov pob, thiab cov milestones. Rau cov tub ntxhais kawm uas pom xiav txias dhau los yog xav tau xim sov dua kom tsom. High-contrast mode hla dhau qhov no.
hmong.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Xaiv drill texts luv los ntev dua. "Luv" pab cov tub ntxhais kawm uas muaj teeb meem attention los yog nkees; "Ntev" yog rau cov uas tsim endurance. Yog drill tsis muaj sample raws li qhov xaiv, nws siv txhua yam.
hmong.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Ib lub dot ntxhib ntxhib ntawm drill screen qhia ib lub rhythm ruaj khov. TSIS muaj kev rau txim yog mus qeeb dua — nws yog ib qho reference, tsis yog deadline. Pab rau motor-planning. Kaw ua ntej.
hmong.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Qhov no yog koj qhov chaw. Vim li cas koj thiaj practice? Koj lub hom phiaj hnub no yog dab tsi? Cais nrog clinician tus IEP goal.

hmong.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: piv txwv, "Ntaus ntawv nyuaj tam sim no, tab sis kuv yuav sau tau kuv tus kheej cov dab neeg." · "Kuv xav email kuv pog yam tsis tas kuv niam pab." · "Ntaus sai dua = tsawg sijhawm ua homework."

hmong.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Game mode xaiv tau. Cov lus nce los saum hauv qab; ntaus lo lus saum toj kom tshem tau. Yog cov pawg ncav txog qhov ru, kev sib tw xaus. Tsis muaj leaderboard, tsis muaj streak guilt — tsuas yog koj personal best.

hmong.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Kev ceev hla dhau accuracy budget. Rov qab mus rau target qeeb dua.
hmong.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Tsib lub slider kho koj lub practice target. Lub widget faib koj lub zone rau ib qho ntawm 5 lub discrete states thiab kos WPM-accuracy Pareto frontier. Tsis muaj score rau koj qhov kho — qhov tshawb nrhiav yog nrhiav cov practice points uas nyob tau ntev.
hmong.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = accuracy zoo tshaj ncav cuag tau ntawm txhua WPM. Saum toj = tsis muaj tseeb; hauv qab = tseem muaj chaw loj hlob.
hmong.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hypothesis (ntawv dawb): Koj lub target nyob tau ntev yog dab tsi? Accuracy floor hloov effective WPM li cas?
hmong.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Nkag — qhia cov lus nug qhib

hmong.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Txo accuracy floor mus rau 80%. Effective WPM puas nce?
hmong.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Cov pros tuav 95%+ ntawm 70+ WPM. Tshawb nrhiav seb cov training paths twg mus txog qhov ntawd.
hmong.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Ib lub target qeeb dua nrog accuracy siab tejzaum tsim tau ntawv ntau dua rau ib session. Sim seb.
hmong.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Kuv nkag siab qhov tradeoff — piav ua kuv cov lus
hmong.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Piav ua koj cov lus: WPM, accuracy, thiab momentum sib cuam tshuam li cas? Pareto frontier txhais li cas rau typing practice?
hmong.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Design note: discrete 5-zone marker; Pareto curve qhia tradeoff space; tsis muaj target "raug" — raws li design.
